{{Infobox character
| name = Kazan Ma Deret
| appears_in = Cradle
| titles = Iron, Forger
| abilities = Path of the Mountain’s Heart
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Kazan]] Ma Deret is a member of the [[Kazan clan]], a group characterized by their frequent use of armor and large metal badges. As a [[Forger]], he follows the [[Path of the Mountain’s Heart]], which allows him to create powerful constructs and weapons. During a confrontation, he demonstrated significant physical strength and the ability to manifest [[madra]] as rippling, box-like shapes around his shoulders. Despite his talent and potential utility to a school through his ability to [[construct]] walls, he engaged in a conflict with [[Lindon]], ultimately falling to a spear strike and bleeding out on the snow.}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Kazan]] Ma Deret is a brown-haired [[Iron]] who walks the [[Path of the Mountain’s Heart]]. As a [[Forger]], they wear an iron badge to signify their status. In their practice, [[Kazan]] Ma Deret utilizes red-brown bricks constructed from solid [[madra]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Kazan Ma Deret]] is an [[Iron]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c15">''Unsouled'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Kazan Ma Deret]] is a [[Forger]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Kazan Ma Deret]] walks the [[Path of the Mountain’s Heart]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Kazan Ma Deret]] has brown hair.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Kazan Ma Deret]] wears an iron badge.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Kazan Ma Deret]] is a [[Forger]] and has learned the [[Path of the Mountain’s Heart]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c16">''Unsouled'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Kazan Ma Deret]] uses [[Forged]] red-brown bricks made of solid [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c17">''Unsouled'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
